name: Gate-Zero Growth: A Geometric Framework for Function-Preserving Continual Learning
summary: arXiv:2607.14571v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce \emph{gate-zero growth}, a function-preserving (FP) operator for continual learning that adds new residual blocks through a zero-initi...
description: arXiv:2607.14571v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We introduce \emph{gate-zero growth}, a function-preserving (FP) operator for continual learning that adds new residual blocks through a zero-initialised gate. Under a transversality condition, gate-zero growth induces \emph{rank separation} in the functional Jacobian: old directions are unchanged, new-weight directions are exactly flat at the g...
author: Dante Lok
